ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough in which the zone is located */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location identifier for the zone */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Object identifier for the zone */,
  "shape_area" REAL /* Area of the zone in square units */,
  "shape_length" REAL /* Length of the zone boundaries in units */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Spatial geometry data for the zone */,
  "trips" INTEGER /* Number of trips within the zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zone was last updated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population within the zone */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the zone */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the zone */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_borough FOREIGN KEY ("borough") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the borough in square units */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the borough was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the borough was last updated */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents in the borough */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the borough */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the location is in */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location the object is in */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the object (e.g., active, inactive, under construction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_data" (
  "spatial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial data entry */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone the spatial data belongs to */,
  "geometry_type" TEXT /* Type of geometry (e.g., Polygon, Multipolygon) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates defining the geometry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spatial data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spatial data was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the spatial data (e.g., satellite, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spatial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_data" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip data entry */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone the trip data belongs to */,
  "trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the trip data */,
  "trip_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trips for the date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip data was last updated */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., car, bus, bike, walk) */,
  "average_trip_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trips in the zone */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours for trips in the zone (e.g., 8-10 AM, 5-7 PM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_data_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the zone data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the zone data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)
